name: Jalapeno Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 8 ounces of boneless chicken breasts with 1/4 cup of lime juice, 2 tablespoons of water, and 1 clove of garlic. Mix well to ensure the chicken is evenly coated.
2. Place the marinated chicken on a baking sheet and broil or grill until fully cooked through.
3. Once cooked, slice the chicken thinly against the grain.
4. Assemble fajitas by placing slices of chicken in warm flour tortillas.
5. Top each tortilla with lettuce, green onions, tomatoes, ripe olives, and a sprinkle of Jalapeno Flavor Process -- Cheese Product.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 8 fajitas.
